skills: price/quantity word problems (shopping math in English)
cloze reading - short passage, environmental theme
grammar: conditionals (if we do not... we will get...)
question_types: instruction-set passage with 2 linked comprehension questions
shopping word-problem (calculate total/change) with picture price tags
informal letter passage with 4-5 linked questions (who/when/how long/sequence)
cloze passage with 4 numbered blanks, thematic vocabulary
reading_patterns: classroom/notice instructions (numbered list) followed by 2 questions about purpose and consequence
informal personal letter (~100 words) followed by questions on sender identity, timing, duration, sequence of events
dialogue_patterns: peer exchange expressing a problem (failed test, thirsty, etc.) -> choose sympathetic/appropriate response
distractor_patterns: wrong arithmetic result from correct-looking price combination
sentence describing a similar but incorrect picture detail
reply that answers a different question type than what was asked
answer_logic: shopping items require summing 2+ priced items and matching to an exact total
letter comprehension requires tracking a timeline of past events narrated out of chronological order
instruction items require distinguishing the stated rule from its stated consequence
notes: Extracted from native embedded PDF text via pdftotext. Same overall structure as 2558: standalone/linked items 1-25ish, dialogues + cloze 26-40.
